keyEvents.text: Substitution, New England Revolution. Peyton Miller replaces Brayan Ceballos because of an injury.
Goal! New England Revolution 0, Columbus Crew 1. Max Arfsten (Columbus Crew) right footed shot from the left side of the six yard box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Diego Rossi.

Goal! New England Revolution 1, Columbus Crew 1. Dor Turgeman (New England Revolution) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Luca Langoni with a cross following a set piece situation.
Substitution, Columbus Crew. Andrés Herrera replaces Hugo Picard.
Substitution, Columbus Crew. Jamal Thiaré replaces Dániel Gazdag.
André Gomes (Columbus Crew) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Matt Turner (New England Revolution) is shown the yellow card.
Goal! New England Revolution 2, Columbus Crew 1. Carles Gil (New England Revolution) converts the penalty with a left footed shot to the high centre of the goal.
Substitution, New England Revolution. Diego Fagúndez replaces Luca Langoni.
Max Arfsten (Columbus Crew) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, Columbus Crew. Sékou Bangoura replaces André Gomes.
Substitution, Columbus Crew. Nariman Akhundzada replaces Steven Moreira.
Substitution, New England Revolution. Eric Klein replaces Dor Turgeman.
Rudy Camacho (Columbus Crew) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
